text.tspan: MASS EVENT
@unhappychoice merges same rubocop-ast bump into 7 repos. Witnesses speechless.
BREAKING
@unhappychoice logs 292 commits in 7 days. Keyboard reportedly filing for workers' comp.
AUTOMATION NATION
@unhappychoice deploys daily LLM pricing bot to splashboard. Markets rattled.
NO DAYS OFF
@unhappychoice commits every single day this week. Rest is a myth, sources confirm.
CLIPPY STRIKES
@unhappychoice manually fixes a useless borrow in gittype. One human commit among hundreds.
MUI MANIA
@unhappychoice upgrades MUI to 9.2.0 across mdts frontend. Icons also affected.
RUBBER STAMP
@unhappychoice approves 52 PRs in 7 days. Zero rejections. Zero mercy for stale deps.
ELECTRON ASCENDS
@unhappychoice ships Electron 43.1.0 to cycle-flyer. Version numbers keep climbing.
MASS EVENT
@unhappychoice merges same rubocop-ast bump into 7 repos. Witnesses speechless.
